summary: Guarantee-First Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 8/9 tests passed (1 skipped due to penalty_amount required constraint). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Payment Settings page displays saved card with green consent info, 'Supprimer' and 'Remplacer la carte' buttons. Settings page shows 4 cards including 'Paiement' card. Dashboard shows 'En attente de garantie' badge for pending appointments. AppointmentDetail shows amber warning banner with 'Compléter ma garantie' and 'Configurer une carte par défaut' buttons. AppointmentWizard review step shows green confirmation when card is saved.

minor.issue: penalty_amount field has ge=1 constraint, cannot test no-penalty flow without schema change

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/user-settings/me/payment-method returns has_payment_method: true with card details
Backend: POST /api/user-settings/me/setup-payment-method returns checkout_url and session_id
Backend: POST /api/appointments/ with penalty and saved card returns status='active' (auto-guarantee)
Backend: POST /api/appointments/ with penalty and saved card does NOT return organizer_checkout_url
Backend: POST /api/appointments/{id}/cancel succeeds for pending appointments
Backend: GET /api/user-settings/me returns user settings with appointment_defaults
Backend: DELETE /api/user-settings/me/payment-method endpoint exists and responds
Frontend: Settings page shows 4 cards including 'Paiement' card with CreditCard icon
Frontend: Payment Settings page displays saved card (Visa 4242) with green consent info
Frontend: Payment Settings page shows 'Supprimer' and 'Remplacer la carte' buttons
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'En attente de garantie' badge for pending_organizer_guarantee appointments
Frontend: AppointmentDetail shows amber warning banner for pending_organizer_guarantee
Frontend: AppointmentDetail shows 'Compléter ma garantie' button
Frontend: AppointmentDetail shows 'Configurer une carte par défaut' button
Frontend: AppointmentWizard review step shows green confirmation when card is saved
critical_code_review_comments: Backend appointments.py correctly implements Option A (auto-guarantee with saved card) at lines 199-237
Backend appointments.py correctly implements Option B (Stripe redirect) at lines 238-267
Backend user_settings.py correctly implements payment method CRUD at lines 193-283
Frontend PaymentSettings.js correctly displays saved card state vs no-card state with appropriate UI
Frontend OrganizerDashboard.js correctly shows 'En attente de garantie' badge at line 118
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly shows pending guarantee banner at lines 864-896
Frontend AppointmentWizard.js correctly shows organizer guarantee info at lines 1108-1135
seed_data_creation: User has saved payment method (Visa 4242, pm_test_dev123) in MongoDB. Test appointments created and cancelled during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guarantee-first feature fully tested. Key points: 1) User has saved payment method (Visa 4242) - auto-guarantee flow works, 2) Appointments with penalty and saved card get status='active' immediately, 3) Dashboard shows 'En attente de garantie' badge for pending appointments, 4) AppointmentDetail shows amber banner with action buttons for pending appointments, 5) AppointmentWizard review step shows green confirmation when card is saved. Test appointment 'test teams connexion log' is in pending_organizer_guarantee status.
